caption: Funnel string-pulling: a wide 120-man battle line and a narrow 30-man squad round the same hill's west side, each walking its OWN lane --- the drawn hillside plus exactly its own clearance margin. The wide line swings out around the shoulder on its ~75 wu margin while the squad tucks in tight on its ~39, where both used to converge onto the same coarse routing-cell corridor lane regardless of width.
